claim: Kimi K2.5 agent swarm uses parallel agent RL (PAL) training to enable up to 100 self-directed sub-agents executing 500 coordinated steps in parallel workflows
actionable: Leverage Kimi's agent swarm for parallel research tasks; specify task and let orchestrator decompose into parallelizable subtasks executed by dynamically-created agents.

claim: Kimi agent swarm executes faster than OpenAI/Gemini deep research due to true parallelization; orchestrator agent monitors and guides sub-agents through reward system during execution
actionable: Use Kimi swarm instead of sequential deep research for multi-faceted research tasks; significant speed advantage for thorough analysis requiring multiple investigation threads.

claim: Kimi K2.5 agent swarm performs agentic mode operations (slides, websites, agent coordination) alongside instant, thinking, and coding models in one suite
actionable: Choose Kimi model variant based on task: instant for fast generation, thinking for reasoning, agent swarm for parallelized research/analysis tasks.

claim: Kimi K2.5 trained on 15 trillion tokens of text/visual; native multimodal supports video-to-code generation and visual debugging for frontend development
actionable: Use Kimi for frontend tasks: provide video of desired UI, get code generation; leverage multimodal understanding for visual debugging and design-to-code workflows.

claim: Agent swarm UI shows parallel agent execution with decomposition steps (explore, generate, decompose, reflect); clicking agents reveals task delegation and progress visualization
actionable: Monitor swarm execution by inspecting individual agents in Kimi UI; understand task decomposition to adjust prompts for better agent coordination.

claim: Kimi K2.5 open source (1T params, 32B active); available via API (Kimi directly, OpenRouter); requires significant GPU compute to self-host but allowed under 100M user limit
actionable: Access Kimi via OpenRouter for easy integration or self-host if you have GPU capacity and <100M users; open weights enable fine-tuning for custom applications.
